examples: A fishbone lodged in his throat.
A fishbone stuck in his throat.
He coughed and choked up a fishbone.
If by the end of it you feel your comedy button has not been pushed, head to Doug Fishbone's Joke Machine.
The Los Angeles-born-and-bred band Fishbone, which delivered a bracing combination of rock, funk, punk, and ska, was one of the brightest lights of late-eighties alternative rock.
